query:
-- Influencer Personalities
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS influencerPersonalities (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  userId INT NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  bio TEXT,
  avatarUrl TEXT,
  personalityType ENUM('flirty', 'friendly', 'mysterious', 'playful', 'sophisticated', 'bold') DEFAULT 'friendly' NOT NULL,
  chatStyle ENUM('casual', 'formal', 'romantic', 'witty', 'seductive') DEFAULT 'casual' NOT NULL,
  responseLength ENUM('short', 'medium', 'long') DEFAULT 'medium' NOT NULL,
  customTraits JSON,
  interests JSON,
  welcomeMessage TEXT,
  autoResponseDelay INT DEFAULT 2000 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  totalConversations INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalMessages INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalRevenue DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Chat Conversations
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatConversations (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NOT NULL,
  creatorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  messageCount INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  fanSpent DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  lastMessageAt TIMESTAMP NULL,
  status ENUM('active', 'archived', 'blocked') DEFAULT 'active' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Chat Messages
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chatMessages (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  conversationId INT NOT NULL,
  role ENUM('fan', 'ai', 'system') NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  hasContentOffer BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  offeredContentId INT NULL,
  isPaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  messageCost DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  metadata JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Exclusive Content
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exclusiveContent (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  creatorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  contentType ENUM('image', 'video', 'gallery', 'message') DEFAULT 'image' NOT NULL,
  previewUrl TEXT,
  fullUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  price DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'usd' NOT NULL,
  totalSales INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalRevenue DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  isActive BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Content Purchases
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contentPurchases (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  contentId INT NOT NULL,
  creatorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  conversationId INT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  platformFee DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  creatorEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  purchasedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Fan Tips
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fanTips (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fanUserId INT NOT NULL,
  creatorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  personalityId INT NULL,
  conversationId INT NULL,
  amount DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  platformFee DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  creatorEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT,
  stripePaymentIntentId VARCHAR(255),
  status ENUM('pending', 'completed', 'refunded') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Creator Earnings
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creatorEarnings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  creatorUserId INT NOT NULL,
  totalEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  pendingEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  paidEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  earningsFromContent DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  earningsFromTips DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  earningsFromMessages DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  totalFans INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalConversations INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  totalContentSold INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  payoutMethod ENUM('stripe', 'paypal', 'bank') DEFAULT 'stripe' NOT NULL,
  payoutEmail VARCHAR(320),
  payoutThreshold DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 50.00 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Fan Tips
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS fanTips (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL

-- Creator Earnings
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creatorEarnings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

  paidEarnings DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,

  earningsFromTips DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  earningsFromMessages DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00 NOT NULL,
  totalFans INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
